failures.description: The agent misread or misinterpreted the ProductCatalogSearch result, selecting item 2243454707 at $164.46 instead of the actual cheapest item, 1240311797 at $137.17.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The user goal was to identify the cheapest available Electric Kettle. The agent correctly planned and invoked ProductCatalogSearch with available_only=true, product_type='Electric Kettle', and sort='price_asc'. The tool output at index 3 clearly listed item 1240311797 at $137.17 first and cheapest. At index 4, the Executor synthesized the answer as item 2243454707 at $164.46, which contradicts the tool output and appears to select the last/most expensive listed item instead of the cheapest. This is not an invalid invocation or underspecification; the necessary evidence was available and the failure came from reasoning over the tool result.
